div.head: The Ambassador in Chile (Bowers) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1294. For Under Secretary. My telegram 1258, August 5, 3 p.m.Not printed. Decree promulgated and published in morning papers. Will be noted it does not prohibit sending of coded messages from Axis Missions. Mysterious feature is that same day of publication head of All-America Cables was instructed officially orally with a promise of a written order not to accept code messages of these Missions and later this order was withdrawn. Shall see Barros Jarpa and get his interpretation. It may be a step by step process. Would appreciate any observations of Department.
